'''竏喇-zh-z-d''' ('''kahazhzedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chafe|chafe]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-zh-z-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chafe|chafe]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 竏喇-zh-z-d
|-
! Lemma
| kahazhzedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thihazhzedoko|thihazhzedoko]] || [[word:jihazhzedoko|jihazhzedoko]] || [[word:shihazhzedoko|shihazhzedoko]] || [[word:kihazhzedoko|kihazhzedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
